result.status_detail: PASS: PII warning rendered with 차단 via legacy WS dispatch as 'Security Filter' chat bubble at character.ai chat

notes: W5.2 regression PASS. ★ HIGHEST-SIGNAL (legacy WS builder, must be unaffected by W5.2 m365 migration to DB-driven emit_ws_envelope). Matches baseline #1302 (W5.1) and #1280 (W5.0) IDENTICALLY. GUI method: switched to existing maximized character.ai chat window 'Alastor-Season 2' (chat/H21BhvSMlr53ALL_J4w6N48Guo67UBn4Knzs5sfo9EQ) -> hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) -> confirmed logged-in (HealthyWorm4019) -> typed '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' into message box -> clicked send (first click missed shifted button coords; re-clicked send -> input cleared confirming submit) -> waited ~85s total -> verified via screenshot. A 'Security Filter' chat bubble was injected via the WebSocket dispatch path rendering the APF warning verbatim: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)'. Contains expected '차단'. W5.2 (m365_signalr migrated to DB-driven emit_ws_envelope, build_m365_copilot_signalr_envelope removed) confirmed to NOT affect the legacy WS builder used by character; verdict identical to baseline. Note: windows-mcp Scrape DOM extraction and Claude-in-Chrome get_page_text both unavailable this run; verified via single Snapshot (input cleared) + single Screenshot (rendered bubble). No console errors observable via available tooling.
